title: scanner-trace-generate-and-docs
description: Phase 3+5: Run the trace generator script to produce golden trace files for all 11 scanner languages, commit them to testdata/scanner-traces/. Run the Go test suite against the generated traces. If tests fail, summarize the failures (which languages, how many entries fail, pattern of failures) and report to the user — do NOT attempt to fix scanner bugs, as that could take a long time. Update README Testing section: add scanner trace tests row to test types table, add generate-scanner-traces to Setup section, note that trace files only need regeneration on grammar version bumps. See docs/scanner-trace-testing-plan.md Phases 3 and Documentation.
